title: 0guard post-submit source intelligence update
tweets:
0guard post-submit update: the project is submitted for the 0G APAC Hackathon, and the live proof stack is deployed on Cloud Run.

Production now exposes 30 rights-aware source lanes and 17 no-network reputation connector candidates.

The new source lanes include disabled-by-default ThreatFox, Chainalysis sanctions oracle, and Google Cloud Web Risk candidates.

Important boundary: no raw feed resale, no hidden API keys, no live fetches until auth, terms, privacy, and retention are reviewed.

The core product is still simple: AI agents should not get to the wallet first.

0guard checks intent, calldata, domain/reputation context, exploit signatures, and source provenance before any signer prompt.

Live proof:
https://arigatoexpress.github.io/0guard/hackathon-0g/

Mini App:
https://guard0-miniapp-s77j6bxyra-uc.a.run.app/telegram

Repo:
https://github.com/arigatoexpress/0guard

#0GHackathon #BuildOn0G
